action.reasoning: Observation: mIoU improved to 0.336 (from 0.284) with ASPP/DeepLabV3-ResNet50 after 20 epochs; val mIoU peaked at 0.3376 in final epoch with loss curve still declining to ~0.7 (underfitting but stable pipeline: DataParallel 4-GPUs, label remap 0->255/1-150->0-149, JSONL logging, batched predict+NN resize). Analysis: Higher bs=24 reduces steps/epoch (~33% faster) allowing 30 epochs in ~3.1h (within 3.88h budget); bump LR to 1e-3 + extend poly scheduler to 30 epochs should yield further gains without architecture change (stays <<1B params); dynamic size= in upsample is more general. Decision: Incrementally edit model.py (dynamic upsample) + train.py (bs=24, epochs=30, lr=1e-3, scheduler update), train then submit best.pt for eval to push mIoU higher while measuring new timing.
